lairWindow_leaf_sin.note: MerlinLairScene.ts line 1166: lairWindow.update(elapsedTime) has NO !lowFpsMode guard. candles (1157), dust (1160) and cauldron (1163) are all gated — lairWindow is the only skipped gate. LairWindow.update() fires 3 Math.sin calls (one per canopy in treeObjects forEach, spring/summer active by default) + 1 Math.sin for glass shimmer (line 198, always active) = 4 total sin calls per frame in low-fps mode. Fix: wrap line 1166 with `if (!lowFpsMode)` — leaf sway and glass shimmer are purely cosmetic.

stone_wall_elongation.note: LairGLBAssets.ts lines 263-310 already use a 3-row instanced mesh approach: ROW_H=16/3=5.33, 3 rows × scale.y=5.33 covering the full 16u wall height. If mur_pierre.glb has 5 stone rows per normalized model unit, effective aspect at scale.y=5.33 is (5.33/5) tall vs (4/4) wide = 1.07:1 — nearly square, not elongated. The scale.y=16 described in RESIDUAL-L-SCALE-01 is no longer present. The 3-row tiling fix was already applied in an earlier cycle. No action required.

sfx_remaining_minigames.note: Zero SFX hits across all 6 non-audited minigames. None of mg_combat_rituel, mg_sang_froid, mg_runes, mg_herboristerie, mg_ombres, mg_course contain any audio wiring. This is a systematic gap — all 6 minigames run in complete silence. Players have no audio feedback on hits, misses, success, or failure events.
sfx_remaining_minigames.recommendation: Wire at minimum 3 SFX events per minigame: (1) action/hit, (2) success/score, (3) failure/timeout. Use the existing SFX infrastructure already present in audited minigames (mg_negociation, mg_echo, etc.) as reference pattern.

volonte_pointercancel_fix.evidence: setup() lines 118-119 register both pointerleave AND pointercancel to onPointerLeave. endGame() lines 213-214 remove both. cleanup() lines 384-385 remove both. Symmetry is complete — no dangling listener risk. onPointerLeave handler defined at line 160.

top_bugs.issue: Zero SFX wiring in mg_combat_rituel, mg_sang_froid, mg_runes, mg_herboristerie, mg_ombres, mg_course
top_bugs.impact: Silent gameplay across 6 of 11 minigames. Player has no audio feedback for any game event.
top_bugs.recommendation: Add minimum 3 SFX calls per minigame (action, success, failure). Reference mg_negociation.ts or mg_echo.ts for the wiring pattern.

top_bugs.issue: lairWindow.update() not gated under !lowFpsMode — 4 Math.sin calls fire on every frame even in low-fps mode
top_bugs.impact: On low-end devices (FPS < 45), leaf sway and glass shimmer still compute 3+1 = 4 sin() calls per frame that are deliberately skipped for candles/dust/cauldron. Wastes ~0.3-0.5ms/frame on low-fps hardware.

top_bugs.issue: RESIDUAL-L-SCALE-01 ticket is stale — scale.y=16 no longer exists
top_bugs.impact: None. 3-row tiling approach (ROW_H=16/3=5.33) produces 1.07:1 aspect ratio — correct.

action_items.action: Wire SFX to all 6 silent minigames
